$description: Composition patterns for reading surfaces — the primary experience of the portal. A reading surface is where Yogananda's words meet the seeker's eyes. Every detail serves sustained, contemplative reading.

chapter-reader.$description: The full chapter reading experience. The most important surface in the entire ecosystem.

tokens.border: none — reading surfaces float, they don't contain

typography.epigraph: srf.typography.reading-light, italic, centered, gold quotation mark

modes.focus: Chrome hidden. Reading column only. Next chapter nav preserved.
modes.present: Chrome hidden. Font size scaled up (24px mobile → 36px wide). For group reading.
modes.quiet: Chrome hidden. Article dimmed. Contextual quiet corner overlay.

features.dwell: 1200ms settled paragraph → related teachings panel. Gold subliminal background on active paragraph.
features.keyboard: j/k paragraph navigation, h/l chapter, d dwell toggle, f focus mode, ? help
features.scroll-indicator: 2px gold bar at top, opacity ambient (0.3), z-index top

passage-card.$description: A single passage displayed outside the chapter reader — search results, Today's Wisdom, related teachings panel.
passage-card.register: sacred (the words are still Yogananda's, even in a card)

tokens.border: none (floats on surface color difference) or border.subtle on hover

content.attribution: citation typography — always visible, never truncated (PRI-02)
content.chapter-link: 'Read in context' — UI typography, gold interactive, links to chapter position

states.hover: gold subliminal (0.06) background shift, border appears

passage-card.animation: interaction transition (150ms) on hover/focus. Content transition (300ms) on appear.

todays-wisdom.$description: Daily featured passage on the home page. Single passage at sacred register with generous framing.

tokens.background: theme.bg (same as page — no card boundary)

content.passage: reading typography, slightly larger (display size for short quotes)
content.ornament: small gold lotus divider below attribution

print.$description: Print stylesheet for reading surfaces. Removes all chrome, sets print-appropriate typography.
rules: Hide: header, footer, nav, scroll indicator, dwell icon
Page breaks: never inside passage-card, always before h2 (chapter titles)
External link URLs shown as parenthetical after the link text
